calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-05-2017 Off Calendar

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Evidentary Hearing On Quiet Title
Off Calendar Apr-11-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Evidentiary Hearing on Quiet Title.
Dept. 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy, Clerk: J. Bertelsen, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Daniel C. Zamora, Esq., and Michelle L. Covington, Esq., specially appearing for Shauna N. Correia on behalf of Plaintiff, Noreen Murphy as beneficiary of the Martin and Noreen Murphy Family Trust u/a/d 1/28/98.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Patrick D. Murphy.
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.
Witness Martin Murphy Jr. sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.

The following exhibits were marked and admitted into Evidence:
Plaintiff's Exhibit A - Deed of Administrator dated 5/21/91
Plaintiff's Exhibit B - Grant deed (individual) dated 7/11/94
Plaintiff's Exhibit C - Grant deed granting Martin Murphy Jr. dated 10/24/95
Plaintiff's Exhibit D - Memo of trust agreement and Grant Deed dated 3/9/98
Plaintiff's Exhibit E - Grant Deed dated 1/6/05
Plaintiff's Exhibit F - Trust transfer deed dated 11/1/13
Plaintiff's Exhibit G - Grant deed dated 12/4/13
Plaintiff's Exhibit H - Grant deed dated 12/4/13
Plaintiff's Exhibit I - Quit Claim Deed dated 1/19/17
Plaintiff's Exhibit J - Quit Claim Deed

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:
The Court finds that Patrick D. Murphy has no rights or title to the subject Property identified as commencing at a point on the Westerly line of 6th Avenue distant thereon 150 feet Southerly from the Southerly line of Irving Street; running thence Southerly and along said line of 6th Avenue 25 feet; thence at a right angle Westerly 120 feet; thence at right angle Northerly 25 feet; thence at a right angle Easterly 120 feet to the point of commencement. Being a portion of Outside Land Block no. 678. Commonly known as 1327-1329 6th Avenue, San Francisco, CA 94122 APN: Lot 7, Block 1761. The Court holds that Patrick D. Murphy has relinquished all ownership rights to the Property.
Damages: $0
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $251.30
Total amount of $251.30
The property is hereby completely vested with all equitable and legal title, rights, and interests in the Ben and Noreen Murphy Family Limited Partnership.
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-10-2017 Continued To May-24-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-11-2017 Continued To Mar-29-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
